# Work Report (2026-05-06 to 2026-05-07)

*Autogenerated by TaskLedger*

## 🦀 Things I've been working on

- **[CNTRLPLANE-3070: Support KMS on self-managed Azure without affecting ARO HCP](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/CNTRLPLANE-3070)**
  - Pushed self-managed Azure KMS encryption implementation: API types with CEL validation, CLI flags, HO/CPO support, e2e tests, and documentation
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/hypershift/pull/8088

- **[CNTRLPLANE-3222: Migrate self-managed Azure e2e tests to v2 Ginkgo framework](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/CNTRLPLANE-3222)**
  - Merged PR: Migrate self-managed Azure e2e tests to v2 Ginkgo framework
  - Pushed Azure v2 self-managed e2e workflow and CI job configuration
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/hypershift/pull/8204, https://github.com/openshift/release/pull/77674

- **[CNTRLPLANE-3314: Unify registry override and image resolution code behind a single abstraction for human and agent readability](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/CNTRLPLANE-3314)**
  - Pushed updated unified image resolution enhancement proposal
  - Addressed review feedback from enxebre and muraee
  - Merged PR: Unified image resolution for HyperShift
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/enhancements/pull/1981

- **[OCPBUGS-85192: Azure hcp destroy --preserve-resource-group silently fails to clean up private DNS resources](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/OCPBUGS-85192)**
  - Added retry logic for Azure DNS cleanup in hcp destroy with unit tests
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/hypershift/pull/8454
